title: Java Programming: Solving Problems with Software
description: Learned to solve real-world problems using Java — covering arrays, CSV parsing, OOP fundamentals, and algorithmic thinking in a project-based curriculum from Duke University.

title: Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python)
description: Foundational Python programming covering variables, expressions, conditionals, functions, and loops — the first course in the renowned Python for Everybody specialization by Dr. Chuck.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Programming for Everybody (Getting Started with Python).pdf

title: Data Structures Using Python — An Introduction
description: Core data structures including lists, stacks, queues, trees, linked lists, and graphs implemented in Python with hands-on examples and complexity analysis.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Data Structures Using Python - An Introduction.pdf

title: Object-Oriented Design
description: Design principles including SOLID, UML class diagrams, design patterns (MVC, Observer), and software architecture best practices from the University of Alberta.

title: Introduction to Cyber Attacks
description: Threat modelling, common attack vectors (DoS, SQL injection, malware), vulnerability analysis, and foundational cybersecurity concepts from NYU Tandon School of Engineering.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Introduction to Cyber Attacks.pdf

title: The Arduino Platform and C Programming
description: Introduction to the Arduino hardware platform and C-based firmware development — covering GPIO, sensors, serial communication, and embedded systems prototyping.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/The Arduino Platform and C Programming.pdf

title: Interfacing with the Arduino
description: Advanced Arduino interfacing — connecting sensors, actuators, LCDs, and wireless modules to build complete IoT prototypes with real-time data processing.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Interfacing with the Arduino.pdf

title: Quantum Computing For Everyone — An Introduction
description: Qubits, quantum gates, superposition, entanglement, and the basics of quantum algorithms — making quantum computing accessible with real-world applications.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Quantum Computing For Everyone - An Introduction.pdf

title: Nanotechnology and Nanosensors, Part 1
issuer: Technion — Israel Institute of Technology • Coursera
description: Fundamentals of nanotechnology, nanomaterial properties, and nanosensor design principles — with applications in healthcare, environmental monitoring, and smart materials.
pdf: data/Data for the certificates/Nanotechnology and Nanosensors, Part1.pdf

title: Write Professional Emails in English
description: Best practices for clear, concise, and professional business communication in written English — covering tone, structure, subject lines, and cross-cultural communication.
